title: Dataset for: Public health risks and control measures associated with live animal and animal product trade in traditional food markets in LMICs
author: Sparaciari, Frida Esther
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This dataset contains the full data extraction used for the systematic scoping review “Public health risks and control measures associated with live animal and animal product trade in traditional food markets in low- and middle-income countries”. The dataset includes extracted information on study characteristics, public health risks, exposure interfaces, human health outcomes, control measures, implementation barriers and facilitators. This protocol has been carried out using the JBI Manual for Evidence Synthesis: Preferred Reporting Items for Systematic Reviews and Extension of Meta-Analysis for Scoping Review Checklists (PRISMA-ScR) template. The results of the review will be available in the related publication.
